name: Fruit-Stuffed Chicken Legs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the orange juice, fruits, and butter with the stuffing mix. Mix until thoroughly moistened.
2. Carefully work fingers between the skin and meat of each chicken leg to form a pocket. Place stuffing under the skin.
3. Arrange the stuffed legs in a 9x9-inch baking dish and sprinkle lightly with cinnamon.
4. Bake uncovered at 375°F for 1 hour.
5. Brush with preserves during the last 10 minutes.
Makes: 3 servings.
